enemies.name: Goblin
enemies.description: A snarling goblin lunges from behind a crumbling pillar!
enemies.successText: Your blade finds its mark. The goblin stumbles back!
enemies.failText: The goblin dodges and slashes back with rusty claws.

enemies.name: Goblin
enemies.description: A second goblin emerges from the shadows, chittering wildly!
enemies.successText: Clean hit — the goblin crashes into the ruins wall!
enemies.failText: It bites! Sharp yellowed teeth find their mark.
